title: Air Fryer Lemon Pepper Tilapia with Roasted Sweet Potato & Arugula
description: Light, high-protein tilapia with crispy lemon pepper crust, paired with roasted sweet potato and a peppery arugula side.
ingredients: 1 tsp extra virgin olive oil (for arugula)
instructions: Toss 300g cubed sweet potato with 1 tsp canola oil and 1/4 tsp salt. Air fry at 400°F for 12-15 minutes, shaking basket halfway, until tender and crisp at edges.
Pat 2 tilapia fillets dry. Brush each with 1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil total, then squeeze 3 tbsp lemon juice over both fillets.
Sprinkle 1 tbsp lemon pepper seasoning evenly over both fillets, pressing gently to adhere.

Once sweet potatoes have about 8 minutes left, add tilapia to air fryer basket in a single layer (use a second batch or stacked rack if needed). Air fry at 400°F for 8-10 minutes, until fish flakes easily and internal temp hits 145°F.
Toss 2 cups arugula with 1 tsp extra virgin olive oil and 1/4 tsp black pepper.
Plate tilapia over arugula with sweet potato on the side.
notes: Tilapia's protein-to-calorie ratio is strong (~17g per 100 cal), among the best lean white fish options. Don't overcrowd the air fryer basket with the fish — single layer keeps the crust from steaming. If batching with the sweet potatoes, cook fish separately for best texture.
